untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of momentum as Z-score deviation (price momentum > +2.0 standard deviations over 20-period lookback) and volume percentile thresholds (75th percentile of 60-period rolling average). These derived statistical measures are not available as pre-computed indicators in the allowed list. Available volume indicator 'vol_ratio_20' approximates high-volume confirmation but cannot precisely implement the specified percentile-based and Z-score momentum thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses vol_ratio_20 (volume ratio over 20 periods) as a proxy for high-volume confirmation. Price crossing sma_20 serves as a directional momentum proxy for CONTEXT_DEPENDENT entry/exit. Precise implementation would require custom momentum Z-score calculation and volume percentile computation not supported by current indicator set.
